data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. SPITFIRE GEORGE got off the mark last time, scoring by one length at this track over 300m (17.85). Drawn well off an inside draw. The one to beat again. 1. TULLOCH ROAD has some solid form under his belt and proved too classy last time to win by 2 lengths at this track in a handy 17.74 beating Stitched Up Lucy. Should feature again. 8. SWOOPING SEASON put in a much better performance last start when in the placings at this track behind Remission Run (17.70) in a Grade 5. Turned chasing the leaders but kept coming. Expected to feature again. 7. BECKY BELLE was out of the money at this circuit last start but can make amends.","runners":[2,1,8,7],"exclusive":false}
